mapper.sql: id, username, password_hash as passwordHash, nickname, avatar_url as avatarUrl, recent_practice_resource_id as recentPracticeResourceId, recent_practice_resource_code as recentPracticeResourceCode, recent_practice_chinese_name as recentPracticeChineseName, recent_practice_sigml_url as recentPracticeSigmlUrl, recent_practice_cover_url as recentPracticeCoverUrl
mapper.select:
select
from app_user where id = #{id} limit 1

select
from app_user where username = #{username} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into app_user ( username, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, recent_practice_resource_id, recent_practice_resource_code, recent_practice_chinese_name, recent_practice_sigml_url, recent_practice_cover_url ) values ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{recentPracticeResourceId}, COALESCE(#{recentPracticeResourceCode}, ''), COALESCE(#{recentPracticeChineseName}, ''), COALESCE(#{recentPracticeSigmlUrl}, ''), COALESCE(#{recentPracticeCoverUrl}, '') )
mapper.update: update app_user set recent_practice_resource_id = #{resourceId}, recent_practice_resource_code = #{resourceCode}, recent_practice_chinese_name = #{chineseName}, recent_practice_sigml_url = #{sigmlUrl}, recent_practice_cover_url = #{coverUrl} where id = #{id}
